positive: Stylized, whimsical illustration of a friendly, bioluminescent deep-sea anglerfish and a graceful, mythical manta ray swimming through a celestial coral reef. The scene should feature glowing jellyfish, ornate coral structures, and particulate matter resembling stardust. Composition should be centrally focused, utilizing deep blues, turquoise, vivid violets, and electric greens for strong contrast. The style is highly polished digital concept art, inspired by Art Nouveau whimsy and modern scientific illustration, with clean, defined silhouettes and a luminous quality. Vector-graphic quality, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: text, words, logo, watermark, signature, grainy, low resolution, blurry, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, noise, monochrome, cropped
